zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Valois於1030年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Raoul IV de Vexin11歲，母親Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil30歲。她於1050年與Herbert IV de Vermandois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1080年在法國維曼多斯享年50歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Valois was born in 1030, in Brittany, France, her father, Raoul IV de Vexin, was 11 and her mother, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, was 30. She married Herbert IV de Vermandois in 1050. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1080, in Vermandois, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Valois est née en 1030, à Bretagne, France, son père, Raoul IV de Vexin, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert IV de Vermandois en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1080, à Vermandois, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Valois 1030 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul IV de Vexin 11 und ihre Mutter Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil 30. Sie hat 1050 Herbert IV de Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1080 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Vermandois, Frankreich und wurde in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Valois è nata il nel 1030 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Raoul IV de Vexin, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Herbert IV de Vermandois nel 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1080, nel Vermandois, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Valoisが1030年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Raoul IV de Vexinは11歳，母Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuilは30歳であった。1050年にHerbert IV de Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1080年にフランスバーマンドイスで50歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Valois(이)가 1030년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul IV de Vexin(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1050년 Herbert IV de Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1080년 프랑스 베먼도이스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Valois nasceu em 1030, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Raoul IV de Vexin, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert IV de Vermandois em 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1080, em Vermandois, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Valois родилась в 1030 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul IV de Vexin было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert IV de Vermandois в 1050 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1080 г. в местности вирмандоис, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Valois nació en 1030, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Raoul IV de Vexin, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Herbert IV de Vermandois en 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1080, en Vermandois, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
